witness_prompts: Where do you notice {frame_1} in the text?
What action in the scene feels most concrete today?
How does the passage invite you to witness without fixing?
What would it mean to stay present with {movement_1}?
prayer_frames: God of presence, stay close as we witness.
Let {action_1} be seen with clarity and care.
Give us grace to respond without haste.
safety_notes_append: Keep language invitational and grounded in the text.
